title: crotalaria subdecurrens
intro: Crotalaria subdecurrens is a species of flowering plant in the pea family, Fabaceae, native to tropical Asia. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various ailments due to its antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Crotalaria subdecurrens include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and protect against oxidative stress, making it a valuable herb in herbal medicine. Crotalaria subdecurrens is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
